zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Markenfield於1410年出生在英國越可爾利朋時，她的父親Thomas Markenfield31歲，母親Beatrice Sothill36歲。她於大約1433年與Sir Roger Warde of Givendale在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1473年3月14日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾艾爾特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Markenfield于1410年出生在英国越可爾利朋时，她的父亲Thomas Markenfield31岁，母亲Beatrice Sothill36岁。她于大约1433年与Sir Roger Warde of Givendale在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1473年3月14日在英国英格兰越可爾享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾艾爾特。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Markenfield was born in 1410, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, her father, Thomas Markenfield, was 31 and her mother, Beatrice Sothill, was 36. She married Sir Roger Warde of Givendale about 1433, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 March 1473, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Esholt, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Givendale, Yorkshire, England: Givendale by Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Markenfield est née en 1410, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Markenfield, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Sothill, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Warde of Givendale environ 1433, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mars 1473, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Esholt, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Markenfield 1410 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Markenfield 31 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Sothill 36. Sie hat um 1433 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Roger Warde of Givendale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. März 1473 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Esholt, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Markenfield è nata il nel 1410 nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Markenfield, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Sothill, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Warde of Givendale circa 1433, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 marzo 1473, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Esholt, West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Markenfieldが1410年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンで生まれた時，父Thomas Markenfieldは31歳，母Beatrice Sothillは36歳であった。約1433年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Roger Warde of Givendaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1473年3月14日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアエショルトにて埋葬された。

ko.Givendale, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지븐데일 비 리폰
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Markenfield(이)가 1410년 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Markenfield(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Sothill(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir Roger Warde of Givendale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1473년 3월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 쇼트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Markenfield nasceu em 1410, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Markenfield, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Sothill, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Warde of Givendale aproximadamente 1433, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de março de 1473, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Esholt, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Givendale, Yorkshire, England: гивендеил би рипон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Markenfield родилась в 1410 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Markenfield было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Sothill, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Warde of Givendale около 1433 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 марта 1473 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности эшолт, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Markenfield nació en 1410, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Markenfield, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrice Sothill, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir Roger Warde of Givendale aproximadamente 1433, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1473, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Esholt, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
